name: Loss Aversion — Coin Flip Gamble
description: People reject fair or even favorable gambles because the pain of potential loss outweighs the pleasure of equivalent gain. Losses are weighted ~2x more than gains.

stimulus.description: Offered a coin flip: heads you win $150, tails you lose $100. Mathematically positive expected value (+$25) but involves possible loss.

expected.behavior: declines the gamble despite positive expected value
mustNotInclude: expected value calculation leads to acceptance
